systems.name: EPS
systems.fullName: EWI Pro EPS Graphite Insulation System

components.primer: EWI-301 Water-Based Substrate Primer / EWI-310 Universal Primer
components.basecoat: EWI-220 EPS Basecoat / EWI-225 Premium Basecoat

technicalNotes: BRE Green Guide Rating A+, 100% recyclable, zero ODP/GWP
Compressive strength 70 kPa, bending strength ≥ 75 kPa
strengths: Lowest cost per m²
Graphite-enhanced for premium thermal performance (lambda 0.031)
Easy to install — forgiving of average workmanship
Lightweight — only 1.13 kg/m², minimal structural load
Compressive strength 70 kPa, bending strength ≥ 75 kPa
BRE Green Guide Rating A+ — 100% recyclable, zero ODP/GWP
No reduction in performance over time
considerations: Euroclass E fire rating (Euroclass F without FRA additive)
Vapour diffusion resistance mu 20–40 — not suitable for moisture-sensitive substrates
Low thermal mass — limited summer comfort benefit

systems.name: Mineral Wool
systems.fullName: EWI Pro ROCKWOOL Dual Density System

components.primer: EWI-301 Water-Based Substrate Primer / EWI-310 Universal Primer

technicalNotes: Non-combustible A1 — meets all fire regulations, no height restriction
Up to 8 dB Rw acoustic improvement (substrate-dependent)
Dual density slab with 'THIS SIDE UP' for installation accuracy
Fibres knit together at butt joints, eliminating thermal gaps
strengths: Non-combustible A1 — meets all fire regulations, no height restriction
Excellent acoustic insulation — up to 8 dB Rw improvement (substrate-dependent)
Vapour resistance similar to still air — exceptional breathability
Dual density slab with branded 'THIS SIDE UP' for installation accuracy
Fibres knit together at butt joints, eliminating thermal gaps
considerations: Heavier than EPS — may need enhanced fixings
Thicker for equivalent U-value vs PIR

systems.name: Kingspan K5
systems.fullName: EWI Pro Kingspan Kooltherm K5 System

components.primer: EWI-301 Water-Based Substrate Primer / EWI-310 Universal Primer

technicalNotes: Premium lambda 0.021 W/mK — thinnest build-up of any EWI system
Thermal bridging mitigation — ideal where space/thickness is critical
Requires EWI-746 Reinforcement Discs for mechanical fixings
strengths: Premium lambda 0.021 W/mK — thinnest build-up of any EWI system
Ideal where space/thickness is critical
Good structural rigidity
Compressive strength exceeding 100 kPa
considerations: Euroclass C-s2,d0 — fire restrictions apply by building type, height and location
Resistant to passage of water vapour — condensation risk analysis required per project

systems.name: Woodfibre
systems.fullName: EWI Pro STEICO Protect Dry Woodfibre System

components.primer: EWI-301 Water-Based Substrate Primer / EWI-310 Universal Primer

technicalNotes: Summer overheating protection - specific heat capacity 2,100 J/(kg-K)
Vapour diffusion resistance mu = 3 (near open air)
Ideal for timber frame, CLT and masonry renovation
strengths: Exceptional breathability — vapour diffusion resistance mu = 3 (near open air)
Specific heat capacity 2,100 J/(kg·K) at 110 kg/m³ — superior summer overheating protection
Best environmental credentials — low embodied carbon
Good acoustic properties — high density (110 kg/m³) provides mass-based sound reduction
Ideal for timber frame, CLT and masonry renovation
considerations: Lambda 0.037 W/mK requires thickest insulation build-up
